author: blockkshane
content:
hey, quick status of beacon-APIs  `produceBlockV4` [PR 580](https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/580) 

While thinking through the stateful block production path, the idea of having the `GET`/`POST` envelope endpoints pass around lighter blinded envelopes came up, and it's implemented in https://github.com/shane-moore/beacon-APIs/pull/10. Would be great to get some eyes on it so we can merge it into #580's branch if folks agree on the approach. After that, 580 should be in good shape to merge to master imo
